changes: Fixed reports page: selecting a specific day now shows only that day's earnings — previously it was accumulating all days from the selected date forward, causing inflated totals
6 automated tests added to lock in correct per-day revenue isolation
Database snapshot created automatically right before every update installs — point-in-time restore is always available
SQLite WAL mode enabled — a crash or power cut during a write no longer risks corrupting the database
Database integrity checked at every startup — owner is warned if corruption is detected before it causes lost orders
Developer database files can no longer be accidentally bundled into a release build
Reports page date picker replaced with a custom calendar popup — click to open, navigate months, pick a day
Selected date shown as formatted label (e.g. '4 jul 2026') instead of raw ISO string
Future dates and months are disabled so invalid selections are not possible
Fixed reports page: selecting a specific date now shows data for that day instead of always showing today
Fixed employee weekly pay not showing when viewing past weeks
CI now runs all 132 automated tests on every push (was only running 1 file)
12 automated tests added for the payment flow (coupon, cash, card, split, ticket)
Database file removed from git history — no more binary noise on every order
Fixed editing a cart item (rice ball or sushi) with Ostión — was incorrectly rejected and used a hardcoded price
Backend split into focused modules (db.py, business.py) for easier maintenance
24 automated tests added for the full ordering flow (rice ball, sushi, cart, edit item, quantity, remove)
Shared CSS consolidated — back button, alert colors, and page title styles now in one place
Cart delete now shows a confirmation dialog before removing an item
Quantity minus button disabled when quantity is already 1
Promo code section collapsed by default on cart page
Rice ball customizer requires style (Fría/Empanizada) before submitting
Live estimated price shown on rice ball and sushi customizers
Ostión price on rice ball and sushi now reads from the DB price table
Split payment form now uses POST + CSRF; added quick-fill buttons for card
Cash overflow on split payment zeroes the card field instead of going negative
Promo discount correctly removed when quantity is changed (no stale pricing)
Queue panel shows last-refreshed timestamp
Admin dashboard stops polling when the browser tab is hidden
Price management page shows inline validation errors per field
Ostión no longer requires 6 regular ingredients on rice balls
Ostión no longer requires 3 regular ingredients on sushi
Ostión can now be added freely alongside any number of regular ingredients
Fixed double-coupon stacking (BxGy promotions now use original price)
Fixed split payment allowing underpayment
Fixed 'yesterday' sales period returning no data
Fixed XSS risk in queue render and autocomplete
Added touch support for autocomplete on tablets
Fixed update banner missing if download completed before page load
Removed broken Tour button from admin dashboard
Fixed admin dashboard stats not loading until 30s after open
Fixed Kuike 'mes' matching inside 'momento'
Fixed recent orders capped at 10 regardless of request
Various Electron process cleanup fixes (port, tray, intervals)
Fixed held orders not printing the kitchen ticket
Auto-updater now checks for updates every 2 hours — no restart needed to see new versions
Fixed customer name input — typing now works correctly on all pages
Name autocomplete replaced with styled custom dropdown (arrow keys, Enter to select)
Fixed cart quantity +/- buttons incrementing by 2 instead of 1
GitHub Actions CI: tests run automatically on every push to main
In-app changelog page at /admin/changelog with full release history
Version badge in admin dashboard header links to changelog
Kuike logic extracted into its own module with table-driven intent routing
43 automated tests for all Kuike intents — all passing
Dashboard summary cards auto-refresh every 30 seconds — no page reload needed
Low-stock toast alert when any inventory item drops below its minimum threshold
Smooth update banner replaces the blocking dialog — restart whenever you're ready
CI workflow: tests run automatically on every push to main
Kuike logic extracted into its own module with table-driven intent routing
Fixed 2 Kuike routing bugs found by automated tests (43 tests, all passing)
Kuike rewritten as fully local assistant — no API key required
Kuike icon changed to 🦐
Kuike moved to a floating bubble widget visible on all admin pages
Kuike now supports 13 intents: ventas, inventario, empleados, horarios pico, pagos, órdenes, productos, promociones, precios, bitácora, clientes frecuentes y más
Split payment support (efectivo + tarjeta en la misma orden)
Customer name autocomplete at checkout
Larger touch targets across POS screens
Enhanced charts on the reports page
Activity log for all admin actions
